languages.original_text: "If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."

languages.text: "Если ваш вердикт, магос, не расходится с действительностью, наилучшим исходом будет полная остановка использования мощностей платформы. Кто знает, как еретические эксперименты повлияли на свойства поставляемого прометия. Лично я предпочел бы не проверять".

"If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."

"If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."

languages.text: 「もしもあなたの判断、マゴスが現実と一致するならば、このプラットフォームの活動を完全に停止させるのが最善の結果となるだろう。異端の研究が供給されたプルームテウムの性質にどのような影響を与えたのかは誰にもわからない。個人的には、その影響を知りたくない」
languages.original_text: "If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."

traits.locale_text: 「もしもあなたの判断、マゴスが現実と一致するならば、このプラットフォームの活動を完全に停止させるのが最善の結果となるだろう。異端の研究が供給されたプルームテウムの性質にどのような影響を与えたのかは誰にもわからない。個人的には、その影響を知りたくない。」

languages.text: « Si votre verdict est exact, magos, il serait plus prudent d'ordonner l'arrêt complet des opérations de la plateforme. Qui sait comment les expériences hérétiques ont pu affecter les propriétés du prométhium fourni ? Personnellement, je préférerais ne pas le découvrir. »
languages.original_text: "If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."

traits.locale_text: « Si votre verdict est exact, magos, il serait plus prudent d'ordonner l'arrêt complet des opérations de la plateforme. Qui sait comment les expériences hérétiques ont pu affecter les propriétés du prométhium fourni ? Personnellement, je préférerais ne pas le découvrir. »

languages.text: "Falls Euer Urteil, Magos, nicht von der Realität abweicht, wäre das beste Ergebnis die Einstellung sämtlicher Operationen der Plattform. Wer weiß, wie die ketzerischen Experimente die Eigenschaften des gelieferten Promethiums beeinflusst haben? Ich für meinen Teil möchte es nicht herausfinden."
languages.original_text: "If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."

traits.locale_text: "Falls Euer Urteil, Magos, nicht von der Realität abweicht, wäre das beste Ergebnis die Einstellung sämtlicher Operationen der Plattform. Wer weiß, wie die ketzerischen Experimente die Eigenschaften des gelieferten Promethiums beeinflusst haben? Ich für meinen Teil möchte es nicht herausfinden."

languages.text: "Magos... Eğer kararınız gerçeklikten farklı değilse en iyi sonuç, platformun faaliyetlerinin tamamen durdurulması olacaktır. Kâfir deneylerinin tedarik edilen prometyumun özelliklerini nasıl etkilediğini kim bilebilir? Şahsen ben öğrenmemeyi tercih ederim."
languages.original_text: "If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."

traits.locale_text: "Magos... Eğer kararınız gerçeklikten farklı değilse en iyi sonuç, platformun faaliyetlerinin tamamen durdurulması olacaktır. Kâfir deneylerinin tedarik edilen prometyumun özelliklerini nasıl etkilediğini kim bilebilir? Şahsen ben öğrenmemeyi tercih ederim."

languages.text: «Si su veredicto, magos, no difiere de la realidad, entonces lo mejor sería un cese absoluto de las operaciones de esta plataforma. ¿Quién sabe cómo habrán afectado los experimentos heréticos a las propiedades del prometio abastecido? Yo personalmente preferiría no tener que averiguarlo».
languages.original_text: "If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."

traits.locale_text: «Si su veredicto, magos, no difiere de la realidad, entonces lo mejor sería un cese absoluto de las operaciones de esta plataforma. ¿Quién sabe cómo habrán afectado los experimentos heréticos a las propiedades del prometio abastecido? Yo personalmente preferiría no tener que averiguarlo».

languages.text: “贤者，如果你的判决与现实没有出入，那么最好的结果应该是全面停止运行这座平台。谁知道那些异端实验对供应的钷素性质产生了什么样的影响？个人而言，我宁愿不去查明。”
languages.original_text: "If your verdict, Magos, does not differ from reality, the best outcome would be the full cessation of the platform's operations. Who knows how the heretical experiments have affected the properties of the supplied promethium? Personally, I would prefer not to find out."

traits.locale_text: “贤者，如果你的判决与现实没有出入，那么最好的结果应该是全面停止运行这座平台。谁知道那些异端实验对供应的钷素性质产生了什么样的影响？个人而言，我宁愿不去查明。”
